what: Historical Brain Atlases for the ggseg Ecosystem
title: Historical Brain Atlases for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: package provides six historical cortical brain atlases digitally reconstructed Pijnenburg et al. (2021) Dutch Connectome Lab.

title: Historical Brain Atlases for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: recommend installing ggseg-atlases ggseg r-universe: can install package GitHub :
code: options(repos = c(   ggseg = "https://ggseg.r-universe.dev",   CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org" ))  install.packages("ggsegHistorical") # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("ggsegverse/ggsegHistorical")

text: Pijnenburg R, Scholtens LH, Mantini D, & van den Heuvel MP (2021). Digitally reconstructed cortical brain maps pioneers Brodmann, Campbell, Economo Koskinas, Flechsig, Kleist, Smith. NeuroImage, 239, 118274.

title: Brodmann Areas Atlas (1909) — brodmann
text: Brain atlas Brodmann areas cortical parcellation 39 regions per hemisphere. Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain() 3D vertex indices ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: Brodmann Areas Atlas (1909) — brodmann
text: ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

title: Brodmann Areas Atlas (1909) — brodmann
text: Brodmann K (1909). Vergleichende Lokalisationslehre der Grosshirnrinde. Leipzig: Johann Ambrosius Barth. Pijnenburg R, et al. (2021). title: Campbell Cortical Atlas (1905) — campbell
text: Brain atlas Campbell (1905) cortical parcellation 17 regions per hemisphere. Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain() 3D vertex indices ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: Campbell Cortical Atlas (1905) — campbell
text: ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

title: Campbell Cortical Atlas (1905) — campbell
text: Campbell .W. (1905). Histological studies localisation cerebral function. Cambridge University Press. Pijnenburg R, et al. (2021). Myelo- cytoarchitectonic microstructural functional human cortical atlases reconstructed common MRI space. NeuroImage, 239, 118274. doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2021.118274

title: Campbell Cortical Atlas (1905) — campbell
code: campbell() #>  #> ── campbell ggseg atlas ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> Type: cortical #> Regions: 17 #> Hemispheres: left, right #> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior #> Palette: ✔ #> Rendering: ✔ ggseg #> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices) #> ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> # A tibble: 34 × 3 #>    hemi  region            label                #>    <chr> <chr>             <chr>                #>  1 left  prefrontal        lh_prefrontal        #>  2 left  frontal           lh_frontal           #>  3 left  inter_precentral  lh_inter_precentral  #>  4 left  precentral        lh_precentral        #>  5 left  postcentral       lh_postcentral       #>  6 left  inter_postcentral lh_inter_postcentral #>  7 left  parietal          lh_parietal          #>  8 left  visuopsychic      lh_visuopsychic      #>  9 left  visuosensory      lh_visuosensory      #> 10 left  temporal          lh_temporal          #> 11 left  audiopsychic      lh_audiopsychic      #> 12 left  audiosensory      lh_audiosensory      #> 13 left  olfactory         lh_olfactory         #> 14 left  limbicA           lh_limbicA           #> 15 left  limbicB           lh_limbicB           #> 16 left  limbicC           lh_limbicC           #> 17 left  insula            lh_insula            #> 18 right prefrontal        rh_prefrontal        #> 19 right frontal           rh_frontal           #> 20 right inter_precentral  rh_inter_precentral  #> 21 right precentral        rh_precentral        #> 22 right postcentral       rh_postcentral       #> 23 right inter_postcentral rh_inter_postcentral #> 24 right parietal          rh_parietal          #> 25 right visuopsychic      rh_visuopsychic      #> 26 right visuosensory      rh_visuosensory      #> 27 right temporal          rh_temporal          #> 28 right audiopsychic      rh_audiopsychic      #> 29 right audiosensory      rh_audiosensory      #> 30 right olfactory         rh_olfactory         #> 31 right limbicA           rh_limbicA           #> 32 right limbicB           rh_limbicB           #> 33 right limbicC           rh_limbicC           #> 34 right insula            rh_insula            plot(campbell())

title: Economo & Koskinas Cytoarchitectonic Atlas (1925) — economo
text: Brain atlas based historical Economo & Koskinas 1925 cytoarchitectonic parcellation 15 regions per hemisphere. Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain() 3D vertex indices ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: Economo & Koskinas Cytoarchitectonic Atlas (1925) — economo
text: ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

title: Economo & Koskinas Cytoarchitectonic Atlas (1925) — economo
text: C.F. von Economo, G.N. Koskinas; Die Cytoarchitektonik Der Hirnrinde Des Erwachsenen Menschen; J. Springer (1925) Pijnenburg R, et al. (2021). what: ggsegHistorical: Historical Brain Atlases for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegHistorical-package
title: ggsegHistorical: Historical Brain Atlases for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegHistorical-package
text: Six historical cortical brain atlases digitally reconstructed Pijnenburg et al. (2021) doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2021.118274  Dutch Connectome Lab. Includes Brodmann (1909), Campbell (1905), Economo & Koskinas (1925), Flechsig (1920), Kleist (1934), Smith (1907). atlas provides unified 'ggseg_atlas' object 2D polygon geometry 3D vertex indices, use 'ggseg' 'ggseg3d'.

title: ggsegHistorical: Historical Brain Atlases for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegHistorical-package
text: Maintainer: Athanasia Mo Mowinckel .m.mowinckel@psykologi.uio.(ORCID)

title: Kleist Functional Segregation Atlas (1934) — kleist
text: Brain atlas historical Kleist 1934 functional segregation 49 regions per hemisphere. Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain() 3D vertex indices ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: Smith Cortical Atlas (1907) — smith
text: Brain atlas Smith 1907 cortical parcellation. Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain() 3D vertex indices ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: Smith Cortical Atlas (1907) — smith
text: ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas object (cortical).

title: Smith Cortical Atlas (1907) — smith
text: G.E. Smith; new topographical survey human cerebral cortex, account distribution anatomically distinct cortical areas relationship cerebral sulci; J. Anat. NeuroImage, 239, 118274. doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2021.118274

title: ggsegHistorical 1.0.0
text: single package. Includes: Brodmann (1909), Campbell (1905), Economo & Koskinas (1925), Flechsig (1920), Kleist (1934), Smith (1907). Replaces individual packages: ggsegBrodmann, ggsegCampbell, ggsegEconomo, ggsegFlechsig, ggsegKleist, ggsegSmith.
